message:
feat: implement Dolt compaction methods (bd-qiepv)

Implement the 4 compaction stub methods for the Dolt backend:
- CheckEligibility: validates issue status, age, and compaction_level
- ApplyCompaction: updates compaction metadata on the issue
- GetTier1Candidates: queries closed issues 30+ days old, not yet compacted
- GetTier2Candidates: queries closed issues 90+ days old, tier 1 compacted

Enable previously-skipped compact tests which now all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:

-	t.Skip("Compaction not yet implemented for Dolt backend")
+	// Compaction is now implemented for Dolt backend
 	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
 	testDB := filepath.Join(tmpDir, ".beads", "beads.db")
 	s := newTestStore(t, testDB)
